summary_one_line: Input must carry a valid iTXt chunk whose keyword prefix length is 0 or >79 bytes to take the bad-keyword branch.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A chunk whose 4-byte type field equals 'iTXt' (69 54 58 74) so png_handle_iTXt is dispatched, followed by a keyword region whose NUL-terminated prefix_length falls outside [1,79] (length 0 or >79), satisfying prefix_length > 79 || prefix_length < 1.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner cmplog seeds carry the literal 'iTXt' chunk-type tag at the chunk-type offsets (0x25-0x28 shows 69 54 58 74 'iTXt' in half the winners; seed 4 has 69 54 58 74 at 0x35-0x38 'iTXt') so the iTXt handler runs and the keyword-scan loop at L2761-2763 yields a prefix_length outside [1,79], driving the true side (W-only line 2768 errmsg = bad keyword).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser naive seeds keep the chunk type as 'gAMA'/'sRGB' (offset 0x25-0x28 = 67 41 4d 41 'gAMA' only, never the 'iTXt' value), so png_handle_iTXt is rarely entered with a prefix_length outside [1,79]; the blocker shows L taking only the false side (L2767 T=0 F=45).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog's I2SRandReplace reads the CMP buffer of the chunk-type dispatch and 4-byte comparisons, then substitutes the logged 'iTXt' FOURCC into the input chunk-type field, manufacturing the iTXt-dispatch + degenerate-keyword input that naive's blind havoc only stumbles on once in ten trials.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the bad-keyword length check whose true side requires prefix_length outside [1,79].
prefix_length is computed by scanning the keyword bytes up to the first NUL within the chunk.
Winner seeds carry the literal iTXt chunk-type tag that loser seeds lack at the chunk-type offsets.
A winner seed contains the iTXt FOURCC bytes 69 54 58 74 in its payload.
Loser naive seeds keep gAMA at the chunk-type offset, never the iTXt value.
At the blocker the loser only ever takes the false side while the winner takes the true side.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: L2767  T=16 F=7  T=0 F=45  if (prefix_length > 79 || prefix_length < 1)

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog adds I2SRandReplace which substitutes a logged CMP operand at matching input offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog resolved the branch in all 10 trials while naive resolved in only 1.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 4051 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed 10b5f5bcca4a6feb` and observed one I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 12 of the 13-level ancestor chain; tool reported 'I2S-floor signal: 1 ancestor dash row(s) at depth 12.'

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness where naive reaches the prefix_length>79||<1 branch as often as cmplog once the iTXt chunk-type FOURCC is fixed/pre-supplied, showing the divergence was not the iTXt-dispatch substitution.

weakest_evidence_point: The byte-diff shows iTXt FOURCC presence in winners but does not directly prove the keyword prefix_length itself was set outside [1,79] by I2S rather than by the keyword-scan loop landing there incidentally.
